# Fixture: shamiya_parker_apple_pay
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 10.7s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi shamiya! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: how do i know if my payment method is accepted
Concierge: Open the Earnings tab ($ icon) → Payment Accounts. Each account shows its verification status.
Partner: can i use apple pay

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Shiftsmart pays through Stripe, which means we need a traditional bank account or a debit card linked to a bank account. Cash App, Apple Pay, PayPal, Zelle, and checks aren't supported. If you don't have a bank account yet, opening one at any major bank or credit union is the fastest way to get paid.
